title: viola velutina
intro: Viola velutina, also known as the velvet violet, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the violet family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Viola velutina include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Viola velutina is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves to utilize its medicinal properties.
